## Applied Optoelectronics (AAOI) scales 800G AI optical shipments; valuation justification questioned

AAOI participating in 800G AI optical shipments suggests demand is broad enough to lift smaller players in the coherent optical market — a positive directional read-through for COHR and LITE; the valuation-question framing is a reminder that the optical rally has already been substantial and may already reflect this demand.

- AAOI is described as scaling 800G optical shipments into AI applications, placing it in the AI networking upgrade cycle.
- The headline is a valuation-justification question, not a confirmed catalyst — framing is cautionary rather than bullish.
- AAOI is not on the watchlist; relevance is as a competitive and demand-signal read-through for optical peers.
- No shipment volumes, customer names, revenue figures, or pricing data appear in the headline.
- Single outlet (simplywall.st) at low classifier confidence.
